# PERF-001 positive: regexp.MustCompile inside loop
lang: go
file: PERF-001-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"regexp"
	"strings"
)

func CountMatches(text string) int {
	parts := strings.Split(text, "\n")
	count := 0
	for _, line := range parts {
		re := regexp.MustCompile(`^[A-Z]+$`)
		if re.MatchString(line) {
			count++
		}
	}
	return count
}
